title: Phase 2 deterministic AI lane executor API

features.title: Deterministic AI Lane Executor API
features.description: Implement the deterministic AI lane executor REST API for the Web Collaboration Beta (F2-07). Adds the two documented endpoints in docs/specs/interface_spec.md § 7: POST /cards/:id/execute (kick off a fixture execution with one of the six documented AI roles) and GET /execute/:taskId (read the status of a previously-queued execution). The fixture executor is pure and synchronous — given the same card and role, returns the same structured result, with no external I/O. Reuses the F2-02 actor helper, the F-003 canExecuteCard authorization helper (with § 5 mandatory gate), the F-002 state-machine module (assertTransition + getRequiredActor), the F2-05 card repository (getCardContext, updateCardState, insertStateTransition), the F2-06 confirmation repository (createHumanConfirmationForExecution), and the F-004 runWithAudit transaction wrapper. Every lifecycle write persists an agent_executions row, an audit_entries row (entity_type 'agent_execution'), and a realtime_events row inside a single transaction; failure rolls back the execution. Backlog Refiner fixture moves backlog cards to todo. Review Guard fixture creates needs_confirmation for high-risk cards.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/cards/:id/execute returns 202 with ExecuteCardResponse (task_id, card_id, role, status='queued', estimated_time, polling_url); 401 without session; 422 VALIDATION_ERROR for invalid role; 403 FORBIDDEN for viewer; 404 NOT_FOUND for missing card; 409 CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED when a pending confirmation exists; 409 STATE_CONFLICT when card is in a terminal state.
GET /api/v1/execute/:taskId returns 200 with ExecuteStatusResponse; 401 without session; 404 NOT_FOUND for missing task; 403 FORBIDDEN for non-readable card.

Backlog Refiner fixture moves a backlog card toward todo: when card.state==='backlog' and role is Backlog Refiner, fixture returns result.new_state='todo' and service applies the (backlog, todo, dependencies_ready) state transition inside runWithAudit.

Review Guard fixture creates needs_confirmation for a high-risk card: when card.riskLevel==='high' and role is Review Guard, fixture creates a human_confirmations row with trigger_type='high_risk' and target_state='done' inside runWithAudit.
Failed execution records error_code + error_message on agent_executions and emits agent_execution.failed realtime event; audit action='execute_failed'.
Every execution lifecycle write persists exactly one agent_executions row, one audit_entries row (entity_type='agent_execution'), and one realtime_events row inside a single runWithAudit transaction.
Every state-changing execution persists exactly one state_transitions row inside the same transaction.
apps/web/src/lib/api/actor.ts is used by every F2-07 route (no F2-02 / F2-03 / F2-04 / F2-05 / F2-06 helper duplication).
canExecuteCard is used by the create service; the helper already encodes the § 5 mandatory gate (returns false when hasPendingConfirmation=true or currentState is terminal).
assertTransition is used for state transitions; IllegalTransitionError is mapped to 409 STATE_CONFLICT (consistent with F2-05 / F2-06).

AGENT_EXECUTION_REALTIME_EVENTS + AGENT_EXECUTION_AUDIT_ENTITY_TYPE are exported from apps/web/src/lib/services/executions.ts as a single source of truth for F2-08 SSE filtering; a snapshot test pins them.
The fixture executor is deterministic: same card + role → same result. It does not call any external I/O (LLM, MCP, ACP, A2A, GitHub, shell, network, filesystem write).
pnpm --filter @keplar/web test passes (the full web suite stays green; F2-06's 499 tests remain green).
pnpm check passes (typecheck + lint + test + build + format:check) with environment warnings only.
No files outside the F2-07 file set or unrelated prior changes are modified.
test_needs: Write failing execution API contract tests first (POST + GET, plus auth matrix, plus fixture executor results)
Cover fixture executor outputs for all 6 roles plus terminal-state rejection
Cover audit_entries + realtime_events + state_transitions write paths per execution
Cover human_confirmations creation when Review Guard on high-risk card
Cover realtime event constant snapshot for F2-08 handoff
Run full web suite for regression
definition_of_done: Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
No unresolved blocking review findings remain
